name: standards fetcher: every fetch records sha256 content_hash of the extracted section (used for §2.21 source: header)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/standards-cache && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/fetcher.sh" --source-id src-1 --fragility-tier high --strategy silent-replace --upstream-stub "$PWD/upstream.sh" --cache "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/standards-cache" --emit-metadata "$PWD/meta.json" && grep -E "content_hash.*sha256:[a-f0-9]" meta.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
